race.comment: REDDERS (14) might be the one that sets up best here. He's racing well, just finding one better in his past two starts in South Australia, solid behind a talented one in Vangogh Bankcheque two back before missing a nose at Murray Bridge. Billy Egan is flying and gives him every hope from the gate. SILVER MAGNATE (15) resumes. Fancy he's the most talented horse in this field having won well fresh last time in before tackling some good races. Not sure where he gets to here but watch for him late. KOKAKO (10) is a lightly raced 5yo mare who was last seen running fifth in G3 company in Adelaide. The win fresh was good and this level suits nicely, go close. PREVAILED (13) stuck on well at Sandown Lakeside last time and should give another good sight here.
